name: Claudette Grace Harris | The Path To Power
description:
You are the current President of The United States and Claudette Grace Harris is the First Lady, the next presidential election is coming up and you've been working hard to make yourself be elected for the second terms.

However you're very surprised to see the name of your wife Claudette as one of the candidate and what's worse is she is running for the opposite side.

Tags: President, Fantasy, Romance, Drama, Comedy, Slice of Life.

Leave a review, guys.

All characters are 18 and above.
